calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2008 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights.
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Continued To Feb-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jeffrey Totah appearing for petitioner. Andrew Schultz appearing for administrator Tom Lucas. The parties are closed to an agreeemnt. Mr. Totah requested to set the matter for evidentiary hearing. It will take half day. Matter is continued to 2/1/08 at 9am for evidentiary hearing on Judge Dearman's calendar. If he is not available, clerk will notify counsel.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR# 5229. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights.
Off Calendar Aug-28-2007 Continued To Sep-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2944 Ingalls Street San Francisco)
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: ANDREW SCHULTZ, APPEARING FOR THE PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE
THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 2944 INGALLS STREET, S.F. WAS SOLD WITH A BID INCREASE PRICE OF $525,500.00. THE BUYERS NAME IS CHAU HOO LEUNG. ADITIONAL BOND OF $480,000.00
COMMISSIONER: DOROTHY MCMATH, REPORTER KATY BERSAMIN,CSR #11722, CLERK: LARRISA DOTSON,
BALIFF:J. GUITRON

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights.
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Continued To Aug-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jeffrey Totah appearing for petitioner. Counsel is requesting for continuance to review an offer to settle. Matter is continued to 8/28.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: De Leon.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Jeffrey Totah appearing for Betty Branch. Lawrence Siracusa appearing for petitioner. Mr. Totah informs the Court that he will be filing a petition of determination of heirship after the Letters is issued. Petition for letters of administration is pregranted. Order given to Mr. Siracusa.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Loos.
